title: HSK3 Level Final Quiz
description: Comprehensive assessment covering all vocabulary, grammar, and sentence patterns from HSK3 Lessons 1-15

questions.question: 我___去图书馆，顺便还书。
questions.question_pinyin: Wǒ ___ qù tú shū guǎn, shùn biàn huán shū.

questions.question: What does 顺便 mean?
Which sentence correctly uses '不...了' to show a change of plan?
option_pinyin: Wǒ qù bù le, tài lèi le.
Wǒ le bú qù, tài lèi le.
Wǒ bú qù le, tài lèi le.
Wǒ bú qù, tài lèi le.
questions.correct_pinyin: Wǒ bú qù le, tài lèi le.

questions.question: 他___五点回来，差不多还有一个小时。
questions.question_pinyin: Tā ___ wǔ diǎn huí lái, chà bu duō hái yǒu yí ge xiǎo shí.

questions.question: Which sentence uses 把字句 correctly?
option_pinyin: Bǎ tā shū fàng zài zhuō zi shàng le.
Tā bǎ fàng shū zài zhuō zi shàng le.
Tā bǎ shū fàng zài zhuō zi shàng le.
Tā fàng bǎ shū zài zhuō zi shàng le.
questions.correct_pinyin: Tā bǎ shū fàng zài zhuō zi shàng le.

questions.question: Translate: 她总是迟到。
questions.question_pinyin: Tā zǒng shì chí dào.

questions.question: 桌子上___着一本书和两支笔。
questions.question_pinyin: Zhuō zi shàng ___ zhe yī běn shū hé liǎng zhī bǐ.

questions.question: Which sentence uses 就 correctly to mean 'right at / right by'?
option_pinyin: Chāo shì jiù zài xué xiào páng biān.
Chāo shì zài xué xiào jiù páng biān.
Chāo shì zài jiù xué xiào páng biān.
Jiù chāo shì zài xué xiào páng biān.
questions.correct_pinyin: Chāo shì jiù zài xué xiào páng biān.

questions.question: Measure word 件 (jiàn) is used for ?
他刚才___自己已经做了所有的作业。
questions.question_pinyin: Tā gāng cái ___ zì jǐ yǐ jīng zuò le suǒ yǒu de zuò yè.

questions.question: What does 自己 mean?
Which sentence correctly uses 而且 to add information?
questions.correct: 他做得很快，而且做得很好。
options: 他做得很快而且，做得很好。
他而且做得很快，做得很好。
他做得很快，而且做得很好。
而且他做得很快，做得很好。
option_pinyin: Tā zuò de hěn kuài ér qiě, zuò de hěn hǎo.
Tā ér qiě zuò de hěn kuài, zuò de hěn hǎo.
Tā zuò de hěn kuài, ér qiě zuò de hěn hǎo.
Ér qiě tā zuò de hěn kuài, zuò de hěn hǎo.
questions.correct_pinyin: Tā zuò de hěn kuài, ér qiě zuò de hěn hǎo.

questions.question: 他___越来越胖了，应该少吃一点。
questions.question_pinyin: Tā ___ yuè lái yuè pàng le, yīng gāi shǎo chī yì diǎn.

questions.question: What does 越...越... mean?
Translate: 你越学越聪明。
questions.question_pinyin: Nǐ yuè xué yuè cōng míng.
questions.correct: The more you study, the smarter you get.
options: You study, and you are also smart.
You should study more to be smarter.
The more you study, the smarter you get.
You are getting smarter and smarter.

questions.question: 他找___到那份文件，因为整理得很乱。
questions.question_pinyin: Tā zhǎo ___ dào nà fèn wén jiàn, yīn wèi zhěng lǐ de hěn luàn.

questions.question: Fill in: ___你已经决定了，___就按计划进行吧。
questions.question_pinyin: ___ nǐ yǐ jīng jué dìng le, ___ jiù àn jì huà jìn xíng ba.

questions.question: What does 明明 express?
questions.correct: Obviously / Clearly (used when something contradicts expectations)
options: Obviously / Clearly (used when something contradicts expectations)

questions.question: 他们结婚___五年了，感情还是很好。
questions.question_pinyin: Tā men jié hūn ___ wǔ nián le, gǎn qíng hái shì hěn hǎo.

questions.question: What is the difference between 刚 and 已经 in terms of time?
questions.correct: 刚 = just now (very recent); 已经 = already (at some point before now)
options: Both mean 'just now' — they are interchangeable
刚 = already (at some point); 已经 = just now (very recent)
刚 is for completed actions; 已经 is for ongoing actions
刚 = just now (very recent); 已经 = already (at some point before now)

questions.question: Translate: 他们分手了，大家都很惊讶。
questions.question_pinyin: Tā men fēn shǒu le, dà jiā dōu hěn jīng yà.
questions.correct: They broke up — everyone was very surprised.
options: They separated for work — everyone understood.
They graduated — everyone was very happy.
They got married — everyone was very surprised.
They broke up — everyone was very surprised.

questions.question: 不管天气怎么样，他___去跑步。
questions.question_pinyin: Bù guǎn tiān qì zěn me yàng, tā ___ qù pǎo bù.

questions.question: Fill in: 他一进门___开始做作业。
questions.question_pinyin: Tā yī jìn mén ___ kāi shǐ zuò zuò yè.

questions.question: Which sentence is correct ?
option_pinyin: Tā qù nǎ lǐ dōu bù pà.
Dōu tā qù nǎ lǐ bù pà.
Tā nǎ lǐ qù dōu bù pà.
Tā bù pà qù dōu nǎ lǐ.
questions.correct_pinyin: Tā qù nǎ lǐ dōu bù pà.

questions.question: Translate: 他的汉语比我还好。
questions.question_pinyin: Tā de hàn yǔ bǐ wǒ hái hǎo.
questions.correct: His Chinese is even better than mine.
options: His Chinese is even better than mine.
My Chinese is better than his.
His Chinese is a little better than mine.
His Chinese is as good as mine.

questions.question: Fill in: 她的汉语说得___中国人___好。
questions.question_pinyin: Tā de hàn yǔ shuō de ___ Zhōng guó rén ___ hǎo.

questions.question: What is the correct structure for a degree complement?
Fill in: 数学比历史难___，我每天都要复习。
questions.question_pinyin: Shù xué bǐ lì shǐ nán ___, wǒ měi tiān dōu yào fù xí.

questions.question: What does 容易一些 mean in a comparison?
Which sentence correctly uses a quantitative complement?
option_pinyin: Tā le fù xí sān ge xiǎo shí.
Tā zài fù xí sān ge xiǎo shí.
Tā fù xí le sān ge xiǎo shí.
Tā sān ge xiǎo shí le fù xí.
questions.correct_pinyin: Tā fù xí le sān ge xiǎo shí.

questions.question: 把___关掉，太吵了！
questions.question_pinyin: Bǎ ___ guān diào, tài chǎo le!

questions.question: What does sentence-final 了 (了2) indicate?
questions.correct: A new situation or change of state
options: A completed action in the past
A new situation or change of state

questions.question: Which sentence uses 别...了 correctly to mean 'stop doing something'?
option_pinyin: Chǎo bié le, wǒ zài shuì jiào!
Bié le chǎo, wǒ zài shuì jiào!
Le bié chǎo, wǒ zài shuì jiào!
Bié chǎo le, wǒ zài shuì jiào!
questions.correct_pinyin: Bié chǎo le, wǒ zài shuì jiào!

questions.question: How does a 被字句 differ from a 把字句?
questions.correct: 被字句 is passive (something happened to the subject); 把字句 is active (subject acts on the object)
options: 被字句 is active; 把字句 is passive
被字句 is only for negative sentences; 把字句 is for positive
They mean the same thing — just different word order
被字句 is passive (something happened to the subject); 把字句 is active (subject acts on the object)

questions.question: Fill in: 那本书___他借走了。
questions.question_pinyin: Nà běn shū ___ tā jiè zǒu le.

questions.question: Translate: 她把钱包放在桌子上了。
questions.question_pinyin: Tā bǎ qián bāo fàng zài zhuō zi shàng le.
questions.correct: She placed her wallet on the table.
options: She placed her wallet on the table.
She found her wallet on the table.
Her wallet was taken from the table.
She lost her wallet on the table.

questions.question: Which sentence correctly uses 是...的 to emphasise how an action was done?
option_pinyin: Tā shì zuò fēi jī lái de.
Tā shì lái zuò fēi jī de.
Tā zuò fēi jī shì lái de.
Shì tā zuò fēi jī lái de.
questions.correct_pinyin: Tā shì zuò fēi jī lái de.

questions.question: Which verb pairs with 地铁 (subway) as the correct transport verb?
What is the negative form of 是...的?
请___，小心！地板很滑。
questions.question_pinyin: Qǐng ___, xiǎo xīn! Dì bǎn hěn huá.

questions.question: What does 把椅子搬过来 mean?
questions.question_pinyin: Bǎ yǐ zi bān guò lái

questions.question: Which sentence correctly uses 起来 in its special sense of 'starting to do'?
option_pinyin: Tā xiào tū rán qǐ lái le.
Tā qǐ lái xiào tū rán le.
Tā tū rán qǐ lái xiào le.
Tā tū rán xiào qǐ lái le.
questions.correct_pinyin: Tā tū rán xiào qǐ lái le.

questions.question: Fill in: 他___每天都去游泳，只有周末休息。
questions.question_pinyin: Tā ___ měi tiān dōu qù yóu yǒng, zhǐ yǒu zhōu mò xiū xī.

questions.question: Which sentence correctly uses 不但...而且?
questions.correct: 这里不但交通方便，而且环境也很好。
options: 这里不但交通方便，而且环境也很好。
这里不但，交通方便而且环境也很好。
这里而且交通方便，不但环境也很好。
不但这里交通方便，环境也很好而且。
option_pinyin: Zhè lǐ bú dàn jiāo tōng fāng biàn, ér qiě huán jìng yě hěn hǎo.
Zhè lǐ bú dàn, jiāo tōng fāng biàn ér qiě huán jìng yě hěn hǎo.
Zhè lǐ ér qiě jiāo tōng fāng biàn, bú dàn huán jìng yě hěn hǎo.
Bù dàn zhè lǐ jiāo tōng fāng biàn, huán jìng yě hěn hǎo ér qiě.
questions.correct_pinyin: Zhè lǐ bú dàn jiāo tōng fāng biàn, ér qiě huán jìng yě hěn hǎo.

questions.question: Translate: 总的来说，这次考试基本上没问题，其他都还行。
questions.question_pinyin: Zǒng de lái shuō, zhè cì kǎo shì jī běn shàng méi wèn tí, qí tā dōu hái xíng.
questions.correct: Generally speaking, this exam was basically fine — the rest were all OK.
options: In general, this exam had many problems — nothing was fine.
Speaking generally, this exam was perfect — everything was excellent.
Generally speaking, this exam was very difficult — nothing was OK.
Generally speaking, this exam was basically fine — the rest were all OK.
